description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow surrounded by a lush, landscaped garden featuring a variety of trees, shrubs, and flowering plants. The building has a flat roof with a section of dark roofing material and large, rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The front yard is enclosed by a low fence and includes a small gate, while the backyard features a patio area with outdoor furniture and a small playhouse. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The property is well-maintained, with manicured lawns and decorative planters enhancing its curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens featuring trees, shrubs, and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, light-colored walls, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs behind the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the entrance gate, symmetrical facade, and a well-maintained front yard with flowering plants.
description_view_2: Backyard view displaying the patio area, outdoor furniture, playhouse, and a mix of palm and deciduous trees.
description_view_3: Side/rear view showing the patio cover, additional garden space, and the extension of the flat roof over the outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
